changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_VOCABULARY_WORDS START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1 NOCACHE NOCYCLE

changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE VOCABULARY_WORDS ( ID NUMBER NOT NULL, USER_ID NUMBER NOT NULL, CATEGORY_ID NUMBER, WORD VARCHAR2(200) NOT NULL, TRANSLATION VARCHAR2(500) NOT NULL, PRONUNCIATION VARCHAR2(300), IPA VARCHAR2(200), PART_OF_SPEECH VARCHAR2(20), CEFR_LEVEL VARCHAR2(2), DIFFICULTY NUMBER(1) DEFAULT 3 NOT NULL, NOTES VARCHAR2(2000), EXAMPLES CLOB, SYNONYMS CLOB, ANTONYMS CLOB, COLLOCATIONS CLOB, RELATED_PHRASAL_VERBS CLOB, IMAGE_URL VARCHAR2(500), AUDIO_URL VARCHAR2(500), CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, UPDATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, ACTIVE NUMBER(1) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_VOCABULARY_WORDS PRIMARY KEY (ID), CONSTRAINT FK_VOCAB_USER FOREIGN KEY (USER_ID) REFERENCES USERS (ID), CONSTRAINT FK_VOCAB_CATEGORY FOREIGN KEY (CATEGORY_ID) REFERENCES CATEGORIES (ID), CONSTRAINT UQ_VOCAB_USER_WORD UNIQUE (USER_ID, WORD), CONSTRAINT CK_VOCAB_CEFR CHECK (CEFR_LEVEL IN ('A1','A2','B1','B2','C1','C2') OR CEFR_LEVEL IS NULL), CONSTRAINT CK_VOCAB_POS CHECK (PART_OF_SPEECH IN ( 'NOUN','VERB','ADJECTIVE','ADVERB','PREPOSITION', 'CONJUNCTION','INTERJECTION','PHRASAL_VERB','EXPRESSION','OTHER' ) OR PART_OF_SPEECH IS NULL), CONSTRAINT CK_VOCAB_DIFFICULTY CHECK (DIFFICULTY BETWEEN 1 AND 5), CONSTRAINT CK_VOCAB_ACTIVE CHECK (ACTIVE IN (0, 1)) )

changeSet.author: englishmemory
